slides.headline: Clinic ops still run by hand.
slides.subtext: One coordinator is still juggling forms, folders, forwarded emails, and expiration dates.

slides.headline: One place. Fewer handoffs.
slides.subtext: ClinicalHours shows how applications, onboarding steps, and status can live in one workflow.

slides.headline: Credential review leaves the inbox.
slides.subtext: Document review becomes visible instead of getting buried in email.

slides.headline: Status stays visible.
slides.subtext: Coordinators can see what is complete, what is expiring, and what still needs action.

slides.headline: See the workflow live.
slides.subtext: Request a demo when you want applications, onboarding steps, and status in one place.
